payload.summary: Bez is studying STR revenue management to become Unwind's expert revenue manager. Knowledge base saved to John's Brain — Business/outputs/STR Revenue Management — Bez Knowledge Base.md. Key tools: Beyond Pricing. Key metrics: RevPAR (north star), pacing vs prior year, MPI. Myrtle Beach peak: June-July (book 47-55 days out). Core principle: optimize for RevPAR not occupancy.
